aboutMe.line1: I enjoy building solutions that scale
aboutMe.line2: well over time and are easy to maintain.
aboutMe.line3: I like focusing on user experience
aboutMe.line4: and working with teams to create useful,

finaipro.title: Full Stack Developer
finaipro.items:
• Developed reusable React components improving development speed across the team
  • Contributed to performance optimization reducing load times
  • Collaborated with UX team to improve user experience in key flows
  • Built and maintained REST APIs using Node.js
  • Worked with PostgreSQL for scalable data solutions

academlo.title: Full Stack Developer and instructor
academlo.items:
• Developed and maintained web services for internal platforms, contributing to the stability and scalability of the system
  • Delivered live technical classes on React, Node.js, Express, and SQL, training 300+ students in real-world web development
  • Mentored students through hands-on projects, helping them build and deploy full stack applications
  • Bridged development and education by simplifying complex technical concepts and improving learning outcomes
  • Strengthened communication, problem-solving, and mentoring skills in a fast-paced learning environment

aisd.title: Junior Full Stack Developer
aisd.items:
• Developed web applications using React and Django, integrating frontend interfaces with backend services
  • Participated in the full development lifecycle, from feature design to implementation, testing, and deployment
  • Built and consumed REST APIs to enable efficient communication between systems
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver user-focused solutions
  • Gained hands-on experience in full stack development, improving code quality and development workflows

testimonials.title: What my coworkers say about me...
testimonials.jorgeRivera:
I had the opportunity to work with Andrés on the web development team, and I can say with complete confidence that he is a well-rounded professional.

As a person, he stands out for his positive energy, collaborative attitude, and his ability to stay focused even under pressure. This combination helps create a healthy and productive work environment.

Professionally, he communicates clearly, asks the right questions, and seeks to understand the context before executing. He doesn’t limit himself to simply developing features; he understands the reasoning behind each decision.

One thing I especially value is his sensitivity toward user experience. Andrés doesn’t just think about code; he understands the importance of UX and how his technical decisions directly impact the end user. This perspective makes him a thoughtful full-stack developer, not just someone focused on execution.

He is, without a doubt, someone who adds value both technically and personally.
testimonials.gabrielMartinez: Andrés not only possesses impressive technical skills as a developer but also stands out as an excellent leader. His ability to tackle challenges and lead by example has left a very positive impact on me and the entire team.
testimonials.brayanMunoz: Working with Andrés has undoubtedly been one of the best experiences. I never considered him just a colleague; rather, he has always been a friend who was ready to help and share his knowledge with all the professionals I have worked with. Andrés is one of the best individuals I have encountered; he has consistently been more of a person than a professional.
testimonials.jesusFernandez: Andrés is more than a friend; he is an exceptional colleague whom I met during the bootcamp at Academlo. From competing for the top spot in class to working together in the same company that saw us grow, he has proven to be not only a brilliant professional in full-stack web development but also an incredibly kind human being always ready to offer support. His combination of technical skills and human quality makes him an invaluable companion.
testimonials.camiloRomero: I had the opportunity to lead Andrés for nearly two years on the Finaipro and ConecTEA projects, and from the moment he joined the team, he consistently brought significant value. He stood out for his proactivity, collaborative attitude, and ability to propose better alternatives, while always remaining open to making changes when they benefited the project. Andrés is a reliable, positive person and truly a pleasure to work with.

projects.title: <bold>Check some of my</bold> <light>personal works...</light>
projects.toursAppDescription: App to manage tours. It have a user view where people can see the tours, can book and can rank them. It also have a admin view, where admins can create a manage tours.
projects.flowboardDescription: Task management app inspired by Jira. It allows users to create boards, lists, and cards to organize their tasks and projects efficiently.
projects.starluxDescription: E-commerce website for a fictional luxury jewelry brand. It features a sleek design, product catalog, shopping cart, and a checkout process to provide users with a seamless online shopping experience.
